case_title: THE TIDES CENTER VS. MICHAEL MABE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MABE, MICHAEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MABE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 JONES STREET, #511 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MABE, MICHAEL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT BENEFIT CORPORATION SERVED AUG-11-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT MABE, MICHAEL
